creator: La Derecha Alternativa
description: For this episode we had the pleasure of speaking to two Puerto Rican fellow travelers of the alt-right and hear some of the history of this island nation and its roots to the spanish empire and the current situation regarding their legal status to the US. In the taco stand we have: Cavernario, Tercio and Paul; Guest: El Jyostishi and Aureliano  You can find us at  twitter,   Facebook  or you can send us an email or shekels via Paypal to derechalter@gmail.com, we appreciate your donations and we wish to remind our patrons that all of our donations are going to Beto's Arepas fund. Contents: Pork is the proof that God exists and loves us and hates the jews… and Tercios wife - Cavernario Puerto Rico serve as an important launch point for the spanish empire in the beggining for the conquest of the americas and then it faded in importance as mexico and peru became more important In the beggining of the XIX (1850-1880) where puerto rico’s woes started due to very bad succesive govermental administrations Puerto Rico is and US colony and at the same time it isn’t… weird Ricardo Duchesne https://youtu.be/kusx1_wRsyQ The puerto rico US colony is a marxist argument Nobody inside puerto ricos media talks about the welfare transfer from the US to puerto rico 50% of Puerto Ricos population is on food stamps only 50% of puerto ricos population Works 33% of those work for the local goverment puerto ricos debt is about 70 billion dlls about 80 thousand puerto ricans migrate to the US on a yearly basis The autistic history and origins of reggeton, where it came from?, what it is and why this justifies glassing that whole island In the late 80’s and early 90’s puerto rico’s became mulatto futurism Marxist terrorism in puerto rico sponsored by Cuba If Puerto Rico becomes another state in the Union you can say goodbye to Trump 2020 The statehood narrative was basically a big welfare check sale to the general population Broke being latino and being against the gringo, Woke, hispanic and knowing your history and be proud of it Puerto Ricans didn’t get Saint Saiya as kids… Sad L The american Dragon Ball Z intro is the weakest race in the universo Demographics, puerto ricans are not White but identify as White, so somewhat proto-castizo futurism
